samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: We are an army made of very few elite soldiers.!NWe can't afford to face those hungry Busters.

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Try to avoid fighting!Nand let's chase after !cff0005 Destroin!cffffff quickly!

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: I don't want any trouble with other tribes..!NLet's avoid all these meaningless fights

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: and chase Destroin quickly!!NPray for these Busters will let us pass..

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: !cff37ffCrow!cffffff, report the progress!

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: If I were him, I would just go to Union!Nand check traces of the !c00ffffWorld Tree!cffffff.

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: So hard to understand Sir !cff0005 Destroin!cffffff.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Because of his irrational actions,!Nwe are in the territory of Buster.

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: I will rise with our Deven soldiers.!NHow about it, my king~?

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Stop it, !cff37ffRuna!cffffff! !cff37ffCrow!cffffff! Don't forget that!Nwe are here to protect Deven's pride!
[Under the control of the leader Adonis, Deven restored!N400 years of distrust with foreign nations and brought back peace.]
[Adonis' twin brother, Destroin, hated what he saw.!Nso he began to absorb the power of]
[the World Tree in Union Elven territory and burn it.!NAdonis later found out about this atrocity...]
!c00ffffPow! Pow! Pooowww!!cffffff
[Thanks to great Helba's effort, Buster came together!Nto create the kingdom 400 years ago..]

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Hahaha!!! Good! Good! Don't give up!Nin the middle of the journey!!

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Simple mind makes it easier~!NHahahaha!!! Everyone is our enemy except us!! Fun!!

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Hahahaha!! You didn't forget~!NMy chief!! Let's start!!

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: I'm here because all you do is sit here and worry.

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Haha!! The descendent of the great !cff0005 Helba!cffffff!!NMy friend, !cff37ffFlora!cffffff, has finally come to senses!!

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: No worries~ No mistake!

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: That was a compliment~~ Sneaky prince~~!NSounds very eccentric and.. cool~

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Hehe~ Thank you!!NWill get into it right away..

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Higher units require more Mana.!NOh, you already know? Haha~

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: This should do for the basics.!NShow your skills in the battle, my prince!

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: It’s strange. The one who vows to conquer!Npasses by such a poor area..

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: Avoiding fights is just not me.!NWhen those starving Buster dogs fall,

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: !cff0005 Destroin!cffffff seems to be headed to Union territory.!NFor some reason, he passed the destination

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: Sir !cff0005 Adonis!cffffff..!

samples.speaker: Crow
samples.text: Stop that nonsense. More dangerous the fight,!Nmore fun we have. I choose to

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: You are one sneaky devil, aren't you?

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: This will do for my brief explanation.!NTime to show and brag your skills.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: This wasn't too long, yeah?!NGood luck, Sir Adonis.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Time to practice! Try upgrading Mana and experience

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: More powerful you means!Nmore powerful nation of Deven~

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: That's a relief..!cff0005 Destroin!cffffff!!!NIt ends here!!

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: There is not enough time. Once he reaches!Ntraces of the !c00ffffWorld Tree!cffffff, it's all over.

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Darn..!!!! We have no choice.. Prepare for battle!

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: What are you saying!!?

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Unnecessary matter..!NTake me to where he is!!

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Showing my determination~!NThose Unions are the proof!!!

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Will do!! I promise.!NThanks for following me, Tigger~~

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Your simplicity sure helps here! Haha.

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: It's all good~ He's one of our own..!NNo need to worry~

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Well~ there is no other way. We just have to trust him!NLook at these Devens here.

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Things are going a bit funny!!

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Well then, I will explain how you will fight.!NDo you see an arrow on bottom left?

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: I've told you almost everything.!NYou already saw that summoning units increase

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Just like population, you can also upgrade Mana.

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Your attacking range is!Nfarther than other units. Use your long range.

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: Miss !cff0005 Flora!cffffff is right. That prince of Union!Ndidn't seem that he was lying.

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: They seemed to be heading north.

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: I don't think it's that simple, miss.!NI've seen abnormal Unions and few Devens together.

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: If he doesn't, then it's the battle against them!NWe need to be prepared.

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: !cff0005 Helba!cffffff's descendent.. Are you going to!Nsit here and do nothing?

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: That greater power is within them.!NSitting here and praying does nothing~

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Just like population, you can also upgrade Mana.

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Your attacking range is!Nfarther than other units..

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: I've taught everything I know..!NEverything else is all you.

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Take a good look around the shop!Nand find items you need~

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: (Passing by destinations!? What is he after?)

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Union's troops! Why would they attack us!?

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Are you controlling their mind?

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Single Blow!!??

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: How about we buy some time before the main!Narmy arrives. Holding the enemy long enough

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: That's what !cff0005 Destroin!cffffff wants.!NHe has seen it. We must capture him.

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: We have matters to take care of.!NIt would be nice of you to make a way..

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Spare you?!NYou heard yourself saying that.

samples.speaker: Adonis
samples.text: Power of the !c00ffffWorld Tree!cffffff is tremendous.. It makes!Neveryone gather and unite as one

samples.speaker: Deen
samples.text: If he's right, we will be able to meet!Nthat twin devil brother at the !c00ffffWorld Tree!cffffff.

samples.speaker: Deen
samples.text: This is not about conquering the castle.!NI must capture Deven's leader

samples.speaker: Deen
samples.text: We were chasing after Deven who damaged the!N!c00ffffWorld Tree!cffffff. We came here unintentionally.

samples.speaker: Deen
samples.text: What is it, Aris?

samples.speaker: Deen
samples.text: How are you? Are you hurt?

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: I will make the great nation of Buster!Nthat the great !c00ffffHelba!cffffff accomplished..

samples.speaker: Deen
samples.text: I think that earthquake in your area!Nis also related.

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Then are you going to Deven's capital?

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Let's go..and ask how it has become like this!!

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Prince !cff37ffDeen!cffffff and Deven's king will be here!NRecognizing them would be

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: I've told you almost everything.!NYou might know already. Summoning units

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Just like population, you can also upgrade Mana.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Your attacking range is!Nfarther than other units..

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: I've taught everything I know..!NEverything else is all you, Sir.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Take a good look around the shop!Nand find items you need.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Manage everything about you here.!NYou can level skills up, equip/upgrade

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Equip items to use or!Ncombine item cards here.

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Welcome to the Babel Tower.!NAt the tower, you can battle against

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: This is the Post Office. You can send or!Nreceive mail from other users~

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Sir Adonis, don't you want to!Ncheck your records?

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Manage everything about you here.!NYou can level skills up, equip/upgrade

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Equip items to use or!Ncombine item cards here..

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Welcome to the Babel Tower.!NAt the tower, you can battle against

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: This is the Post Office~ You can send or!Nreceive mail from other users..

samples.speaker: Tigger
samples.text: Flora, don't you want to!Ncheck your records?

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Manage everything about you here.!NYou can level skills up, equip/upgrade

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Equip items to use or!Ncombine item cards here..

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: Welcome to the Babel Tower.!NAt the tower, you can battle against

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: This is the Post Office. You can send or!Nreceive mail from other users~

samples.speaker: Aris
samples.text: My prince, don't you want to!Ncheck your records?

samples.speaker: Adel
samples.text: They seemed to abandon the castle and go north.!NHow about conquering their abandoned castle?

samples.speaker: Adel
samples.text: Yes sir!!

samples.speaker: Adel
samples.text: I'm here, my prince!

samples.speaker: Adel
samples.text: Don’t be weak! I've seen those Devens in the battle.!NThey looked strong and willing.

samples.speaker: Adel
samples.text: For Union!!

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: It didn't look like they were protecting their turf.!NThey were too violent

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: He must have a big misunderstanding..

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Yes, my king!

samples.speaker: Runa
samples.text: Yes, my king.

samples.speaker: ルナ
samples.text: 不法侵入しただけにしては、過激すぎますわ。!Nまるで仇討のような勢いですわね..

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: Miss !cff0005 Flora!cffffff!!! Union's army has appeared!Nin our territory!!

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: Those Busters on the battlefield..They didn’t!Nlook normal, although they were against you,

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: Ma'am!! There is a Buster nomad!!

samples.speaker: Aguilar
samples.text: Watch your words, Sir !c00ffffTigger!cffffff!!

samples.speaker: アギラ
samples.text: !cFF0005フローラ!cFFFFFF様!! バスター領域にユニオンの部隊が!N侵入してきました!

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: What!? Why!? How many are there!?

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: The World Tree has been damaged?

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Deven did it? That nation did not cause!Nany trouble for hundreds of years..

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: Again? Of course I want to save them but..

samples.speaker: Flora
samples.text: !c00ffffTi..Tigger!cffffff..
